title: lindsaea subalpina
intro: Lindsaea subalpina, also known as the subalpine lindsaea fern, is a type of plant in the family Lindsaeaceae, specifically a species of lindsaea fern native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Lindsaea subalpina include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and prevent the growth of bacteria and other microorganisms. In herbal preparations, Lindsaea subalpina is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in traditional remedies such as poultices and salves.
